2026-0171
2026-02-26GACOther Than Statutory AuthorityOrder authorizing the Minister of Foreign Affairs be authorized to sign, the Agreement on Social Security between Canada and the Republic of MoldovaOrder authorizing the Prime Minister, the Minister of Foreign Affairs, or a delegate, to sign, on behalf of the Government of Canada, subject to ratification, the Agreement on Social Security between Canada and the Republic of Moldova.N/A
subject: Order authorizing the Minister of Foreign Affairs be authorized to sign, the Agreement on Social Security between Canada and the Republic of Moldova
precis: Order authorizing the Prime Minister, the Minister of Foreign Affairs, or a delegate, to sign, on behalf of the Government of Canada, subject to ratification, the Agreement on Social Security between Canada and the Republic of Moldova.
